nodes.context: Criminal organization from Bari, Italy, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and gambling.
Criminal organization from Bari, Italy, historical ally of Clan Capriati.

edges.evidence_quote: ha avuto anche il sostegno di Tommaso Parisi, figlio di Savino Parisi, boss del clan Parisi, storico alleato dei Capriati.
edges.context: Clan Parisi is a historical ally of Clan Capriati, providing support.
